task_summary: ST18: Exercise StandalonePageEntity.currentRevision relation — add a DB-gated integration test that loads the entity with relations:["currentRevision"] and asserts the joined revision is the current one. Closes the deferred-register note that the @ManyToOne decorator existed but was never exercised.
acceptance_criteria: A test or product path loads a StandalonePageEntity with currentRevision populated and asserts the joined revision is the current one.
Runs (or skips cleanly) under SFUS_DB_INTEGRATION without breaking the default no-DB test pass.
No schema change; createForeignKeyConstraints:false semantics preserved.
test_location_guidance: apps/api/src/pages/pages.service.integration.test.ts — Test 3 (the new case) is inside the existing describe.skipIf(!DB_INTEGRATION_ENABLED) block. Run worktree-locally: /home/tstephen/repos/worktrees/ms4-st18-implementer-20260608/node_modules/.bin/vitest run --root /home/tstephen/repos/worktrees/ms4-st18-implementer-20260608/apps/api
implementation_context: Added Test 3 to the existing DB-gated integration suite (pages.service.integration.test.ts). The test: (1) calls service.create() to create a page and gets back an entity with currentRevisionId set; (2) calls pageRepo.findOne({ where: { id }, relations: ["currentRevision"] }) to exercise the TypeORM relation join; (3) asserts currentRevision is non-null and defined; (4) asserts currentRevision.id === created.currentRevisionId (non-vacuous: a mis-joined relation would produce a different id or null); (5) asserts revisionNumber === 1, pageId matches, authorUserId matches. No schema change; createForeignKeyConstraints:false semantics preserved. Test-only change; no product consumer added. Docs impact: NONE.
validation_outcome: All pass. Default no-DB run: 863 tests passed, 3 skipped (integration suite incl. new Test 3 skips cleanly). Typecheck: 0 errors. Lint: 0 warnings. API tsc build: clean. DB-gated path not run (no DB available); clean-skip proven; assertion correctness verified by inspection.
docs_impact: NONE — only a DB-gated test was added; no product consumer introduced. docs/features/pages.md does not require update.
